Schema Interface\n17\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:38`  \n18\t**Signature:** `Validate(value interface{}) error`\n19\t\n20\t```go\n21\ttype Schema interface {\n22\t    Validate(value interface{}) error\n23\t}\n24\t```\n25\t\n26\t**Purpose:** Generic validation interface for validating values against schema rules.  \n27\t**Returns:** `error` - nil if valid, error if validation fails.\n28\t\n29\t---\n30\t\n31\t### 2. ValidatedSchema Interface\n32\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:31`  \n33\t**Signature:** `Validate() YAMLError`\n34\t\n35\t```go\n36\ttype ValidatedSchema interface {\n37\t    Validate() YAMLError\n38\t    Name() string\n39\t    Description() string\n40\t}\n41\t```\n42\t\n43\t**Purpose:** Validates the schema definition itself (not data against schema).  \n44\t**Returns:** `YAMLError` if schema definition is invalid.\n45\t\n46\t---\n47\t\n48\t### 3. SchemaValidator Interface\n49\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:71`  \n50\t**Signature:** `Validate(data map[string]interface{}) SchemaValidationResult`\n51\t\n52\t```go\n53\ttype SchemaValidator interface {\n54\t    Validate(data map[string]interface{}) SchemaValidationResult\n55\t    ValidateFile(filePath string) SchemaValidationResult\n56\t}\n57\t```\n58\t\n59\t**Purpose:** Validates YAML data against a schema.  \n60\t**Returns:** `SchemaValidationResult` with detailed error information.\n61\t\n62\t---\n63\t\n64\t### 4. Constraint Interface\n65\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:89`  \n66\t**Signature:** `Validate(value interface{}) *ConstraintError`\n67\t\n68\t```go\n69\ttype Constraint interface {\n70\t    Validate(value interface{}) *ConstraintError\n71\t    Description() string\n72\t    ConstraintType() string\n73\t}\n74\t```\n75\t\n76\t**Purpose:** Checks if a value satisfies a constraint.  \n77\t**Returns:** `*ConstraintError` if constraint violated, nil otherwise.\n78\t\n79\t---\n80\t\n81\t### 5. Validator Interface (main yamlutil API)\n82\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/interfaces.go:106`  \n83\t**Signature:** Multiple Validate methods\n84\t\n85\t```go\n86\ttype Validator interface {\n87\t    ValidateFile(filePath string) ValidationResult\n88\t    ValidateString(yamlContent string) ValidationResult\n89\t    ValidateStringWithPath(yamlContent, filePath string) ValidationResult\n90\t    ValidateMultipleFiles(filePaths []string) []ValidationResult\n91\t}\n92\t```\n93\t\n94\t**Purpose:** Main API for YAML validation with syntax, schema, and custom validation.  \n95\t**Returns:** `ValidationResult` with errors, warnings, and timing info.\n96\t\n97\t---\n98\t\n99\t## Production Code Call Sites\n100\t\n101\t### Direct Calls (HIGH PRIORITY - Need Error Handling Updates)\n102\t\n103\t#### 1. SchemaValidator.Validate() → Schema.Validate()\n104\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:180`  \n105\t**Context:** SchemaValidator validates data against compiled schema\n106\t\n107\t```go\n108\tfunc (sv *SchemaValidator) Validate(data interface{}) SchemaValidationResult {\n109\t    // ... setup code ...\n110\t    \n111\t    // Validate data against schema\n112\t    if err := sv.schema.Validate(data); err != nil {\n113\t        result.Valid = false\n114\t        \n115\t        // Handle YAMLError with structured information\n116\t        if yamlErr, ok := err.(YAMLError); ok {\n117\t            result.Errors = append(result.Errors, SchemaValidationError{\n118\t                Message:   yamlErr.Error(),\n119\t                ErrorCode: yamlErr.Code(),\n120\t            })\n121\t        } else {\n122\t            // Handle generic errors\n123\t            result.Errors = append(result.Errors, SchemaValidationError{\n124\t                Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"Validation failed: %v\", err),\n125\t            })\n126\t        }\n127\t        return result\n128\t    }\n129\t    // ... continue ...\n130\t}\n131\t```\n132\t\n133\t**Status:** ✅ **HAS ERROR HANDLING** - Already handles YAMLError type checking  \n134\t**Type:** Direct call to Schema interface  \n135\t**Update Priority:** LOW - Already has proper error handling  \n136\t**Notes:** This is the primary call site that other code paths use indirectly.\n137\t\n138\t---\n139\t\n140\t#### 2. Validator.ValidateMultipleFiles()\n196\t**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:315`  \n197\t**Context:** Loop calling ValidateFile on each path\n198\t\n199\t```go\n200\tfunc (v *Validator) \n221\t**Signature:** `func (s *SchemaDefinition) Validate(value interface{}) error`\n222\t\n223\t```go\n224\tfunc (s *SchemaDefinition) Validate(value interface{}) error {\n225\t    if value == nil {\n226\t        return NewValidationError(\"\", \"value cannot be nil\", \"\", \"\", \n227\t            ErrCodeValidationFailed, 0, 0, ErrorTypeValidation, \"\")\n228\t    }\n229\t    \n230\t    data, ok := value.(map[string]interface{})\n231\t    if !ok {\n232\t        return NewTypeMismatchError(\"\", \"\", \"map[string]interface{}\", \n233\t            fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", value), \"\", 0, ErrCodeTypeMismatch)\n234\t    }\n235\t    \n236\t    // Validate root fields\n237\t    for fieldName, fieldDef := range s.RootFields {\n238\t        if fieldDef.Required {\n239\t            if _, exists := data[fieldName]; !exists {\n240\t                return NewFieldNotFoundError(\"\", fieldName, 0, ErrCodeRequiredField)\n241\t            }\n242\t        }\n243\t        \n244\t        if fieldValue, exists := data[fieldName]; exists {\n245\t            if err := s.validateField(fieldValue, fieldDef, fieldName); err != nil {\n246\t                return err\n247\t            }\n248\t        }\n249\t    }\n250\t    \n251\t    return nil\n252\t}\n253\t```\n254\t\n255\t**Status:** ✅ **IMPLEMENTATION** - Returns YAMLError types  \n256\t**Type:** Method implementation  \n257\t**Update Priority:** LOW - Already returns proper error types  \n258\t**Notes:** This is the Schema interface implementation used by SchemaValidator.\n259\t\n260\t---\n261\t\n262\t## Test Code Call Schema Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:38`  \n**Signature:** `Validate(value interface{}) error`\n\n```go\ntype Schema interface {\n    Validate(value interface{}) error\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Generic validation interface for validating values against schema rules.  \n**Returns:** `error` - nil if valid, error if validation fails.\n\n---\n\n### 2. ValidatedSchema Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:31`  \n**Signature:** `Validate() YAMLError`\n\n```go\ntype ValidatedSchema interface {\n    Validate() YAMLError\n    Name() string\n    Description() string\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Validates the schema definition itself (not data against schema).  \n**Returns:** `YAMLError` if schema definition is invalid.\n\n---\n\n### 3. SchemaValidator Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:71`  \n**Signature:** `Validate(data map[string]interface{}) SchemaValidationResult`\n\n```go\ntype SchemaValidator interface {\n    Validate(data map[string]interface{}) SchemaValidationResult\n    ValidateFile(filePath string) SchemaValidationResult\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Validates YAML data against a schema.  \n**Returns:** `SchemaValidationResult` with detailed error information.\n\n---\n\n### 4. Constraint Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:89`  \n**Signature:** `Validate(value interface{}) *ConstraintError`\n\n```go\ntype Constraint interface {\n    Validate(value interface{}) *ConstraintError\n    Description() string\n    ConstraintType() string\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Checks if a value satisfies a constraint.  \n**Returns:** `*ConstraintError` if constraint violated, nil otherwise.\n\n---\n\n### 5. Validator Interface (main yamlutil API)\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/interfaces.go:106`  \n**Signature:** Multiple Validate methods\n\n```go\ntype Validator interface {\n    ValidateFile(filePath string) ValidationResult\n    ValidateString(yamlContent string) ValidationResult\n    ValidateStringWithPath(yamlContent, filePath string) ValidationResult\n    ValidateMultipleFiles(filePaths []string) []ValidationResult\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Main API for YAML validation with syntax, schema, and custom validation.  \n**Returns:** `ValidationResult` with errors, warnings, and timing info.\n\n---\n\n## Production Code Call Sites\n\n### Direct Calls (HIGH PRIORITY - Need Error Handling Updates)\n\n#### 1. SchemaValidator.Validate() → Schema.Validate()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:180`  \n**Context:** SchemaValidator validates data against compiled schema\n\n```go\nfunc (sv *SchemaValidator) Validate(data interface{}) SchemaValidationResult {\n    // ... setup code ...\n    \n    // Validate data against schema\n    if err := sv.schema.Validate(data); err != nil {\n        result.Valid = false\n        \n        // Handle YAMLError with structured information\n        if yamlErr, ok := err.(YAMLError); ok {\n            result.Errors = append(result.Errors, SchemaValidationError{\n                Message:   yamlErr.Error(),\n                ErrorCode: yamlErr.Code(),\n            })\n        } else {\n            // Handle generic errors\n            result.Errors = append(result.Errors, SchemaValidationError{\n                Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"Validation failed: %v\", err),\n            })\n        }\n        return result\n    }\n    // ... continue ...\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **HAS ERROR HANDLING** - Already handles YAMLError type checking  \n**Type:** Direct call to Schema interface  \n**Update Priority:** LOW - Already has proper error handling  \n**Notes:** This is the primary call site that other code paths use indirectly.\n\n---\n\n#### 2. SchemaValidator.ValidateFile() → SchemaValidator.Validate()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:253`  \n**Context:** ValidateFile delegates to Validate\n\n```go\nfunc (sv *SchemaValidator) ValidateFile(filePath string) SchemaValidationResult {\n    // ... file reading code ...\n    \n    return sv.Validate(data)\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **WRAPPED CALL** - Delegates to Validate() above  \n**Type:** Wrapped call  \n**Update Priority:** LOW - Inherits error handling from Validate()  \n**Notes:** This is a wrapper that returns the result from Validate().\n\n---\n\n#### 3. Validator.ValidateString() → ValidateStringWithPath()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:110`  \n**Context:** ValidateString delegates to ValidateStringWithPath\n\n```go\nfunc (v *Validator) ValidateString(yamlContent string) ValidationResult {\n    return v.ValidateStringWithPath(yamlContent, \"<string>\")\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **WRAPPED CALL**  \n**Type:** Wrapper delegation  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - No direct Validate() call  \n**Notes:** Simple delegation wrapper.\n\n---\n\n#### 4. Validator.ValidateFile() → ValidateStringWithPath()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:174`  \n**Context:** ValidateFile reads and delegates to ValidateStringWithPath\n\n```go\nfunc (v *Validator) ValidateFile(filePath string) ValidationResult {\n    content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)\n    // ... error handling ...\n    return v.ValidateStringWithPath(string(content), filePath)\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **WRAPPED CALL**  \n**Type:** Wrapper delegation  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - No direct Validate() call  \n**Notes:** Reads file then delegates.\n\n---\n\n#### 5. Validator.ValidateMultipleFiles()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:315`  \n**Context:** Loop calling ValidateFile on each path\n\n```go\nfunc (v *Validator) ValidateMultipleFiles(filePaths []string) []ValidationResult {\n    results := make([]ValidationResult, len(filePaths))\n    for i, path := range filePaths {\n        result := v.ValidateFile(path)\n        results[i] = result\n    }\n    return results\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **INDIRECT CALL** - Calls ValidateFile() which calls ValidateStringWithPath()  \n**Type:** Indirect call chain  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - No direct Validate() call  \n**Notes:** Iterates over files calling ValidateFile for each.\n\n---\n\n## SchemaDefinition Implementation\n\n#### SchemaDefinition.Validate() Implementation\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:770`  \n**Signature:** `func (s *SchemaDefinition) Validate(value interface{}) error`\n\n```go\nfunc (s *SchemaDefinition) Validate(value interface{}) error {\n    if value == nil {\n        return NewValidationError(\"\", \"value cannot be nil\", \"\", \"\", \n            ErrCodeValidationFailed, 0, 0, ErrorTypeValidation, \"\")\n    }\n    \n    data, ok := value.(map[string]interface{})\n    if !ok {\n        return NewTypeMismatchError(\"\", \"\", \"map[string]interface{}\", \n            fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", value), \"\", 0, ErrCodeTypeMismatch)\n    }\n    \n    // Validate root fields\n    for fieldName, fieldDef := range s.RootFields {\n        if fieldDef.Required {\n            if _, exists := data[fieldName]; !exists {\n                return NewFieldNotFoundError(\"\", fieldName, 0, ErrCodeRequiredField)\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if fieldValue, exists := data[fieldName]; exists {\n            if err := s.validateField(fieldValue, fieldDef, fieldName); err != nil {\n                return err\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return nil\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **IMPLEMENTATION** - Returns YAMLError types  \n**Type:** Method implementation  \n**Update Priority:** LOW - Already returns proper error types  \n**Notes:** This is the Schema interface implementation used by SchemaValidator.\n\n---\n\n## Test Code Call Sites\n\n### Test Files Using Validate()\n\n#### 1. schema_validation_test.go - ValidatedSchema.Validate() tests\n**File:** Schema Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:38`  \n**Signature:** `Validate(value interface{}) error`\n\n```go\ntype Schema interface {\n    Validate(value interface{}) error\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Generic validation interface for validating values against schema rules.  \n**Returns:** `error` - nil if valid, error if validation fails.\n\n---\n\n### 2. ValidatedSchema Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:31`  \n**Signature:** `Validate() YAMLError`\n\n```go\ntype ValidatedSchema interface {\n    Validate() YAMLError\n    Name() string\n    Description() string\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Validates the schema definition itself (not data against schema).  \n**Returns:** `YAMLError` if schema definition is invalid.\n\n---\n\n### 3. SchemaValidator Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:71`  \n**Signature:** `Validate(data map[string]interface{}) SchemaValidationResult`\n\n```go\ntype SchemaValidator interface {\n    Validate(data map[string]interface{}) SchemaValidationResult\n    ValidateFile(filePath string) SchemaValidationResult\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Validates YAML data against a schema.  \n**Returns:** `SchemaValidationResult` with detailed error information.\n\n---\n\n### 4. Constraint Interface\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema_interfaces.go:89`  \n**Signature:** `Validate(value interface{}) *ConstraintError`\n\n```go\ntype Constraint interface {\n    Validate(value interface{}) *ConstraintError\n    Description() string\n    ConstraintType() string\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Checks if a value satisfies a constraint.  \n**Returns:** `*ConstraintError` if constraint violated, nil otherwise.\n\n---\n\n### 5. Validator Interface (main yamlutil API)\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/interfaces.go:106`  \n**Signature:** Multiple Validate methods\n\n```go\ntype Validator interface {\n    ValidateFile(filePath string) ValidationResult\n    ValidateString(yamlContent string) ValidationResult\n    ValidateStringWithPath(yamlContent, filePath string) ValidationResult\n    ValidateMultipleFiles(filePaths []string) []ValidationResult\n}\n```\n\n**Purpose:** Main API for YAML validation with syntax, schema, and custom validation.  \n**Returns:** `ValidationResult` with errors, warnings, and timing info.\n\n---\n\n## Production Code Call Sites\n\n### Direct Calls (HIGH PRIORITY - Need Error Handling Updates)\n\n#### 1. SchemaValidator.Validate() → Schema.Validate()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:180`  \n**Context:** SchemaValidator validates data against compiled schema\n\n```go\nfunc (sv *SchemaValidator) Validate(data interface{}) SchemaValidationResult {\n    // ... setup code ...\n    \n    // Validate data against schema\n    if err := sv.schema.Validate(data); err != nil {\n        result.Valid = false\n        \n        // Handle YAMLError with structured information\n        if yamlErr, ok := err.(YAMLError); ok {\n            result.Errors = append(result.Errors, SchemaValidationError{\n                Message:   yamlErr.Error(),\n                ErrorCode: yamlErr.Code(),\n            })\n        } else {\n            // Handle generic errors\n            result.Errors = append(result.Errors, SchemaValidationError{\n                Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"Validation failed: %v\", err),\n            })\n        }\n        return result\n    }\n    // ... continue ...\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **HAS ERROR HANDLING** - Already handles YAMLError type checking  \n**Type:** Direct call to Schema interface  \n**Update Priority:** LOW - Already has proper error handling  \n**Notes:** This is the primary call site that other code paths use indirectly.\n\n---\n\n#### 2. SchemaValidator.ValidateFile() → SchemaValidator.Validate()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:253`  \n**Context:** ValidateFile delegates to Validate\n\n```go\nfunc (sv *SchemaValidator) ValidateFile(filePath string) SchemaValidationResult {\n    // ... file reading code ...\n    \n    return sv.Validate(data)\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **WRAPPED CALL** - Delegates to Validate() above  \n**Type:** Wrapped call  \n**Update Priority:** LOW - Inherits error handling from Validate()  \n**Notes:** This is a wrapper that returns the result from Validate().\n\n---\n\n#### 3. Validator.ValidateString() → ValidateStringWithPath()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:110`  \n**Context:** ValidateString delegates to ValidateStringWithPath\n\n```go\nfunc (v *Validator) ValidateString(yamlContent string) ValidationResult {\n    return v.ValidateStringWithPath(yamlContent, \"<string>\")\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **WRAPPED CALL**  \n**Type:** Wrapper delegation  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - No direct Validate() call  \n**Notes:** Simple delegation wrapper.\n\n---\n\n#### 4. Validator.ValidateFile() → ValidateStringWithPath()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:174`  \n**Context:** ValidateFile reads and delegates to ValidateStringWithPath\n\n```go\nfunc (v *Validator) ValidateFile(filePath string) ValidationResult {\n    content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)\n    // ... error handling ...\n    return v.ValidateStringWithPath(string(content), filePath)\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **WRAPPED CALL**  \n**Type:** Wrapper delegation  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - No direct Validate() call  \n**Notes:** Reads file then delegates.\n\n---\n\n#### 5. Validator.ValidateMultipleFiles()\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/validator.go:315`  \n**Context:** Loop calling ValidateFile on each path\n\n```go\nfunc (v *Validator) ValidateMultipleFiles(filePaths []string) []ValidationResult {\n    results := make([]ValidationResult, len(filePaths))\n    for i, path := range filePaths {\n        result := v.ValidateFile(path)\n        results[i] = result\n    }\n    return results\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **INDIRECT CALL** - Calls ValidateFile() which calls ValidateStringWithPath()  \n**Type:** Indirect call chain  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - No direct Validate() call  \n**Notes:** Iterates over files calling ValidateFile for each.\n\n---\n\n## SchemaDefinition Implementation\n\n#### SchemaDefinition.Validate() Implementation\n**File:** `internal/yamlutil/schema.go:770`  \n**Signature:** `func (s *SchemaDefinition) Validate(value interface{}) error`\n\n```go\nfunc (s *SchemaDefinition) Validate(value interface{}) error {\n    if value == nil {\n        return NewValidationError(\"\", \"value cannot be nil\", \"\", \"\", \n            ErrCodeValidationFailed, 0, 0, ErrorTypeValidation, \"\")\n    }\n    \n    data, ok := value.(map[string]interface{})\n    if !ok {\n        return NewTypeMismatchError(\"\", \"\", \"map[string]interface{}\", \n            fmt.Sprintf(\"%T\", value), \"\", 0, ErrCodeTypeMismatch)\n    }\n    \n    // Validate root fields\n    for fieldName, fieldDef := range s.RootFields {\n        if fieldDef.Required {\n            if _, exists := data[fieldName]; !exists {\n                return NewFieldNotFoundError(\"\", fieldName, 0, ErrCodeRequiredField)\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if fieldValue, exists := data[fieldName]; exists {\n            if err := s.validateField(fieldValue, fieldDef, fieldName); err != nil {\n                return err\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return nil\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **IMPLEMENTATION** - Returns YAMLError types  \n**Type:** Method implementation  \n**Update Priority:** LOW - Already returns proper error types  \n**Notes:** This is the Schema interface implementation used by SchemaValidator.\n\n---\n\n## Test Code Call Sites\n\n### Test Files Using Validate()\n\n#### 1. schema_validation_test.go - ValidatedSchema.Validate() tests\n**File:** %v\", tt.name, err)\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Status:** ✅ **TEST CODE** - Already validates YAMLError compatibility  \n**Type:** Test code  \n**Update Priority:** N/A - Test code already checks error types
